packages.name: @chirag127/astro-billing
packages.title: Astro Billing
packages.description: Razorpay checkout (single-domain on oriz.in) + 3-tier <Pricing /> + Firestore webhook for the oriz family.

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-chrome
packages.title: Astro Chrome
packages.description: Shared visual chrome for chirag127 Astro sites — Header / Footer / Wordmark / AccountPanel / FinishSignIn / MultiSearch / StatusBanner / ConsentBanner / LegalFooter. Mobile-first responsive at 320/768/1024/1440. Peer-deps on @chirag127/astro-shell.

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-content
packages.title: Astro Content
packages.description: Zod content-collection schemas + RSS + Atom + JSON-Feed + sitemap + IndexNow + OG-card. Peer-deps on @chirag127/astro-chrome.

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-data
packages.title: Astro Data
packages.description: Data-fetching primitives — TanStack Query setup, typed Firestore helpers, LocalStorage hooks.

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-distribute
packages.title: Astro Distribute
packages.description: Thin CLI wrapping PWABuilder (primary — AAB / MSIX / iOS-project) and optional Tauri for desktop EXE/dmg/AppImage from one Astro build.

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-forms
packages.title: Astro Forms
packages.description: Form helpers — react-hook-form + Zod resolvers + shadcn-style Form wrappers + honeypot + Web3Forms client.

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-pwa
packages.title: Astro Pwa
packages.description: Locked @vite-pwa/astro defaults for the chirag127 family — manifest from astro-chrome brand, offline shell, <InstallPrompt>, <UpdateToast>.

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-shell
packages.title: Astro Shell
packages.description: Astro 6 base layer — shell() defineConfig wrapper + OrizSiteConfig type + integrations preset (React + sitemap + MDX) + Tailwind v4 vite plugin + reusable Cloudflare Pages deploy workflow + design tokens + dynamic family-data registry (FAMILY_APPS / FAMILY_PACKAGES / FAMILY_APIS / FAMILY_BOOKS / FAMILY_EXTENSIONS / FAMILY_SKILLS).

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-test-utils
packages.title: Astro Test Utils
packages.description: Common Vitest + Playwright + MSW + Firebase test fixtures for the chirag127/oriz family. Thin wrapper over @firebase/rules-unit-testing, msw, @playwright/test.

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-tools
packages.title: Astro Tools
packages.description: ToolGrid + ToolCard + ToolPage components for utility/tool sites. Peer-deps on @chirag127/astro-chrome.

packages.name: @chirag127/astro-widgets
packages.title: Astro Widgets
packages.description: Shared cross-app islands — <MultiSearch> popover, <StatusBanner>, <ConsentBanner> (Klaro). Datasheet Dark tokens via @chirag127/astro-chrome.

packages.name: @chirag127/auth-cli
packages.title: Auth Cli
packages.description: CLI auth — Firebase OAuth device-code flow + token store at ~/.config/oriz/auth.json + refresh on 401. Peer-deps on @chirag127/auth-core.

packages.name: @chirag127/auth-core
packages.title: Auth Core
packages.description: Cross-surface auth primitives — auth.oriz.in URL helpers, Firebase ID-token verify, refresh logic. Runtime-agnostic. Peer-dep of auth-wxt / auth-vsc / auth-cli.

packages.name: @chirag127/auth-vsc
packages.title: Auth Vsc
packages.description: VS Code extension auth — vscode.authentication API + Firebase ID-token mint via REST + secure-storage via context.secrets. Peer-deps on @chirag127/auth-core.

packages.name: @chirag127/auth-wxt
packages.title: Auth Wxt
packages.description: Browser-extension auth — chrome.identity.launchWebAuthFlow bouncing through auth.oriz.in, ID-token in chrome.storage.local. Chrome / Firefox / Edge via @wxt-dev/browser. Peer-deps on @chirag127/auth-core.

packages.name: @chirag127/omni-publish
packages.title: Omni Publish
packages.description: Auto-publish release notes / blog posts to multiple platforms (dev.to, Hashnode, Bluesky, Mastodon, Threads) + Telegram drafts queue for manual platforms (X, Reddit, LinkedIn, Medium). Platform fan-out is env-gated.

packages.name: @chirag127/oriz-ai-providers
packages.title: Oriz AI Providers
packages.description: Thin wrapper around 20 free LLM APIs (OVHcloud, LLM7, Pollinations, Cerebras, Groq, NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, Google AI Studio, Cohere, GitHub Models, Cloudflare Workers AI, HuggingFace, Mistral, SambaNova, Z.AI, SiliconFlow, Aion Labs, Ollama Cloud, ModelScope, Kilo Code). OpenAI SDK-compatible client with priority-based fallback chain.

packages.name: @chirag127/oriz-analytics
packages.title: Oriz Analytics
packages.description: Single wrapper around Cloudflare Web Analytics + GA4 + Microsoft Clarity + Sentry. One init() call, four backends, zero PII.

packages.name: @chirag127/oriz-book-build
packages.title: Oriz Book Build
packages.description: Pandoc-wrapping CLI for the chirag127/oriz family. Builds EPUB3 / PDF / MOBI / Markua from a manuscript/ dir of Markua-flavoured .md files + book.json metadata. Used by oriz-*-book repos and exposed via `oriz-book` bin.

packages.name: @chirag127/oriz-consent
packages.title: Oriz Consent
packages.description: Klaro-based consent manager covering EU GDPR + UK + India DPDP + US GPC (Global Privacy Control) signals. Cookie banner + preference center.

packages.name: @chirag127/oriz-rate-limit
packages.title: Oriz Rate Limit
packages.description: Per-user usage caps for Free/Pro/Max tiers (10/100/unlimited requests per day). Edge-friendly token bucket built on Cloudflare KV / Durable Objects.

packages.name: @chirag127/oriz-seo
packages.title: Oriz Seo
packages.description: Sitemap.xml + IndexNow ping + JSON-LD structured data + dynamic OG image generation via satori. SEO toolkit for Astro/Next sites.

packages.name: @chirag127/oriz-ui
packages.title: Oriz UI
packages.description: Shared Oriz UI — ContactForm + widgets used across the chirag127/oriz* family.
